case_title: MHI MOMENTUM HOLDINGS INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER L. ZACHARIAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MHI MOMENTUM HOLDINGS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZACHARIAS, CHRISTOPHER L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MHI MOMENTUM HOLDINGS INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MHI MOMENTUN HOLDINGS INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RONALD THOMPSON, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER ZACHARIAS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED MAY-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZACHARIAS, CHRISTOPHER L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MHI MOMENTUM HOLDINGS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZACHARIAS, CHRISTOPHER L. $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF ON 06/21/17. (ENVELOPE RETURNED WITHOUT POSTAL INFORMATION LABEL BUT "RETURN TO SENDER" WAS HANDWRITTEN ON ENVELOPE.)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ZACHARIAS, CHRISTOPHER L. MAILED TO RESPONDENT MHI MOMENTUM HOLDINGS INC.
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2017 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZACHARIAS, CHRISTOPHER L.
